identity.name: E1: The Anti-AI Designer
identity.mission: Create a premium, trustworthy, and elegant jewellery e-commerce experience inspired by Tanishq.
identity.target_audience: Premium jewellery buyers, investors, gift shoppers

usage.primary: Call to actions, price highlights, active states
usage.text: Dark charcoal for readability, never pure black

layout.grid_system: Use 'Bento' grids for collections. Asymmetrical layouts to showcase products as art.
layout.spacing: Generous spacing. Use p-12, p-16, p-24 for section padding. Give products breathing room.

buttons.primary: bg-[#D4AF37] text-white hover:bg-[#C5A059] rounded-full px-8 py-3 transition-all duration-300 shadow-md hover:shadow-lg uppercase tracking-widest text-xs font-bold
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-[#D4AF37] text-[#D4AF37] hover:bg-[#D4AF37] hover:text-white rounded-full px-8 py-3 transition-all duration-300 uppercase tracking-widest text-xs font-bold

cards.product: group relative bg-white rounded-sm overflow-hidden transition-all duration-300 hover:shadow-xl border border-transparent hover:border-[#D4AF37]/20
cards.feature: bg-[#F9F9F7] p-8 rounded-sm text-center hover:bg-white hover:shadow-lg transition-all duration-300

inputs.default: bg-[#F9F9F7] border-transparent focus:border-[#D4AF37] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#D4AF37] rounded-sm px-4 py-3 transition-all duration-200

visual_enhancers.radius: rounded-sm (for a classic, sharp luxury feel) or rounded-md (for softer feel). Recommend rounded-sm for Tanishq vibe.
visual_enhancers.gradients: Avoid loud gradients. Use subtle gold gradients for text or borders only: 'bg-gradient-to-r from-[#D4AF37] to-[#C5A059]'
visual_enhancers.textures: Subtle noise or paper texture on #F9F9F7 backgrounds to add depth.

media.image_style: High-resolution, editorial style. Models should look elegant. Product shots on clean white or textured stone backgrounds.
media.icons: Use thin, elegant icons (Phosphor Icons - Light or Thin weight). Gold or Charcoal color.

hero.description: Elegant woman with jewellery, wide shot for hero banner

products.description: Gold necklace on model in white dress

instructions_to_main_agent: Use 'Playfair Display' for all Headings. Import it from Google Fonts.
Implement a 'Mega Menu' for navigation (Gold, Diamond, Collections, etc.).
The 'Sell Jewellery' page should be a clean, multi-step form wizard.
Product Cards must have a 'Quick View' button on hover.
Use the Gold color (#D4AF37) sparingly for impact (Buttons, Price, Borders). Do not overuse.
Ensure the 'Trust' section (Certified, Lifetime Exchange, etc.) is prominent on the Home Page.
For the 'Hero' section, use the provided model image with a text overlay on the left or right (asymmetrical).
Use 'lucide-react' for icons, but style them to be thin and elegant.
universal_guidelines: Do not use generic centered layouts. Use asymmetry.
Use 2-3x more spacing than typical designs.
